description: The TouchButton component is used to make a physical button with no press depth that is instantly pressable upon click or touch. For a button with press depth, please see PhysicalButton.

fields.IsPressed: Whether the button is pressed or not
fields.IsHovering: Whether the button is being pointed at with the laser in the case of a touch button
fields.EditModeOnly: Whether this button will only work if the user is in Edit Mode
fields.ActiveUserFilter: How to handle user interaction depending on active user.
fields.Pressed: The Sync Delegate to call when the button is pressed.
fields.Pressing: The Sync Delegate to call when the button is being pressed every game tick.
fields.Released: The Sync Delegate to call when the button is released.
fields.BeginPressVibration: What vibration to send when this button is starting to be pressed.
fields.PressVibration: What vibration to send when this button is pressed.
fields.HoverVibration: What vibration to send when this button is hovered over via laser.
fields.Label: The field that represents this button's label.

usage: Used in boopers and buttons where PhysicalButton is a bad choice because the button press needs to have no press depth. In the case where the user does want press depth, use PhysicalButton.
